name: Kid Coega
description: Personal Gunmen: Kidd Knuckle    Kid Coega is another new member of Team Dai-Gurren. His Gunmen utilizes two pistols to attack enemies, the Kid Knuckle. Kid is killed during the first deep space battle versus the Anti-Spirals, when he and Iraak attempt to avenge Zorthy's death.    Kid's post-timeskip design bears a striking resemblance to Lupin III.    from wikipedia
